summary: TWO_ROW: top GREEN NumberLine (-3..5) labeled (R, +); bottom ORANGE NumberLine (0..8) labeled (R_{>0}, ×). YELLOW Dot at 0 (top) and at 1 (bottom) — the respective group identities. Action demo: top slides LEFT by 2 units via .shift; bottom stretches by factor 2 about the point 1 via .stretch(..., about_point=1). Right-bottom summary calls the group action names 'slide by a' vs 'stretch by factor k from 1'.
